subcodes.first_line: O Abbas! The Wronged One of the world maketh mention of thee with such remembrance as shall cause its sun never to set from the horizon of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عباس مظلوم عالم ترا ذکر مینماید بذکریکه آفتابش از برج بیان غروب ننماید و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
